title: net/http Transport Ownership, Redirects, Bodies, and Timeouts · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations review reconstructs net/http transport ownership, redirects, bodies, and timeouts from revision, authorization, seed, URL, robots decision, request, response bytes, tree identity, record provenance, frontier transition, goroutine owner, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for owned bounded net/http retrieval adapter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Configure and reuse one owned Transport with explicit proxy, dial, TLS, idle pool, compression, limits, and CloseIdleConnections policy.
Build safe retrieval requests with context, honest User-Agent and contact, Accept, validators, method, credentials, and trace identity.
Use CheckRedirect to reapply authorization, URL, credentials, method, DNS, loop, and hop budgets while retaining the chain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Timeout Context
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 4496 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove Transport reuse, request identity, redirect checks, body limits, deadlines, and closure; browser Go remains deterministic and free of native network, parser, filesystem, process, and host effects; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Assign dial, TLS, header, body, attempt, job, and shutdown deadlines through Transport settings and context causes.

Inspect the Timeout Context trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Timeout Context.
